MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,476.70 FILED BY HACK, MICHAEL DR. AS TO DEFENDANT SELLARS, SEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELLE MCGILL FILED BY HACK, MICHAEL DR.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE MCGILL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HACK, MICHAEL DR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELLARS, SEAN $1,476.70 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,586.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
